calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Anthony Vaughn (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2005 Continued To Oct-17-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 10/17/2005 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by:Scott Hughes, CSR#12365 (212)
